title: Mellow Australian Citrus Lasagna
description: A citrusy, creamy lasagna that evokes warm Australian afternoons, perfect for a comforting vegetarian dinner.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C and lightly grease a 23x33 cm baking dish.
In a bowl, combine ricotta, feta, spinach, orange zest, lemon juice, olive oil, and minced garlic; season with salt and pepper.
Spread a thin layer of the cheese mixture in the bottom of the dish, then arrange six lasagna sheets over it.
Spoon half of the remaining cheese mixture over the sheets and top with another layer of sheets.
Repeat the layers, finishing with the cheese mixture and a final sheet on top.
Cover the dish tightly with foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and broil for 3-4 minutes until golden and bubbly.
Let the lasagna rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
